notes: Form 4562 Depreciation and Amortization — wave 6 widget map. Synthetic semantic mapping covering Part I (Section 179), Part II (special/bonus depreciation), Part III (MACRS summary rows only), Part IV (summary totals), and Part VI (amortization total).

Per-asset repeating blocks (Part III Section B rows, Part V listed property rows, Part VI amortization rows) are NOT individually mapped — those tables render via continuation statements in a future wave. The computed per-asset detail is still available on the Layer 1 Form4562Fields dataclass so Layer 2 can emit an attached statement if the filer needs one.
Header rows: f1_1 is the taxpayer name, f1_2 is the business or activity to which this form relates, f1_3 is the identifying number (SSN/EIN).

Part I layout: f1_4 = line 1 max ($1,250,000), f1_5 = line 2 total cost, f1_6 = line 3 threshold ($3,130,000), f1_7 = line 4 reduction, f1_8 = line 5 dollar limit after reduction, f1_15 = line 7 listed property, f1_16 = line 8 total elected cost, f1_17 = line 9 tentative deduction, f1_18 = line 10 carryover from prior year, f1_19 = line 11 business income limitation, f1_20 = line 12 §179 deduction current year, f1_21 = line 13 carryover to next year.
Part II: f1_22 = line 14 special depreciation allowance, f1_23 = line 15 listed property special, f1_24 = line 16 other depreciation.
Part III: f1_25 = line 17 MACRS prior years, c1_1 = line 18 checkbox for group election.
Part IV / Part VI summary widgets live on page 2; f2_57 ~= line 22 total depreciation, f2_58 ~= line 23 current-year portion; Part VI line 44 amortization total lives at f3_13 on page 3.

Widget positions verified via coordinate inspection of the 2025 form PDF. Because the IRS may reshuffle the f1_N numbering between issues, the Layer 2 renderer silently skips widgets that cannot be resolved (a widget_name absent from the reader's field list) — the SHA-256 pin is the load-bearing check for form revisions.
